title: Model v7.0: Census 2011 DC2101EW, per-LA migration, 25 findings
summary: Major model upgrade. Census 2011 DC2101EW (18 groups, observed) replaces NEWETHPOP proportional splitting. MAE improved 2.45 to 1.71pp. Per-LA ethnic migration rates from Census 2021. Scenario selector on every place page. Cost calculator. Backlog clock. Postcode resolver. Grant rate appeal toggle. 25 findings live.

title: Asy_D04 outcome analysis: true grant rates after appeals
summary: Home Office outcome analysis (Dec 2025) integrated. 103 nationalities with initial + appeal-adjusted grant rates. Average uplift +14.1pp. Iran 67% initial to 85% after appeals. Sri Lanka 27% to 59%.

title: ONS Births 2024 fertility data integrated
summary: Empirical TFRs from ONS Linked Births 2024. White British TFR 1.31, Pakistani 2.52. National ASFRs by age band. IMD deprivation fertility gradient 1.66x. 567,460 births analysed.

title: National asylum statistics updated
summary: Year ending December 2025 figures published, including 107,200 people on support and 31,000 in hotels.

title: Committee report confirms 197 hotels in use
summary: Home Affairs Committee report captures the official count of hotels in use as of 5 January 2026.

title: Local authority asylum and resettlement tables updated
summary: Latest public local release remained the year ending September 2025, with Glasgow still highest by count.

title: Home Office publishes hotel cost factsheet
summary: Average daily hotel cost for 2024/25 published at GBP 5.77 million.
